title: 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE - 211info
text: SUBSTANCE ABUSE AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ADMINISTRATION 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a national network of local crisis centers that offer free and confidential emotional support to people in suicidal crisis or emotional distress. 5600 Fishers Lane Rockville, MD 20857 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 273-8255 988 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (800) 273-8255 Can also dial 988 TTY/TTD (800) 799-4889 Español (888) 628-9454 Text Short Code 988 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website for live chat or more information. If the chat service appears offline or busy, calling instead for immediate assistance is recommended. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, ASL, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - DISASTER DISTRESS HELPLINE INFORMATION SERVICES - FINDTREATMENT.GOV SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE ABUSE AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ADMINISTRATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SUBSTANCE ABUSE AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ADMINISTRATION
